subject: New Request: Software Engineer – TypeScript
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the healthcare sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Software Engineer with strong experience in TypeScript. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• TypeScript
• Azure
• Docker
• DynamoDB

Details:
Client: VitalisIT
Start: 2024-03-11
Duration: TBD
Location: Stockholm (remote)
Rate: up to 1000 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Lena Eriksson
Business Director
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 73 345 67 89
